movie.actors: Arnold Schwarzenegger, James Caan, Vanessa Williams, James Coburn
movie.awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. Another 3 wins & 1 nomination.
movie.plot: A Witness Protection specialist becomes suspicious of his co-workers when dealing with a case involving high-tech weapons.
movie.title: Eraser
movie.writer: Tony Puryear (story), Walon Green (story), Michael S. Chernuchin (story), Tony Puryear (screenplay), Walon Green (screenplay)
